data: {"generalSituation":"A southerly airstream will affect the coast of Guangdong in the next few days. It will be hot during the day over the region. An anticyclone aloft will bring generally fine weather to the northern part of the South China Sea and the coast of southern China in the next couple of days. The anticyclone aloft is expected to weaken midweek this week. Under the influence of a trough of low pressure, there will be a few showers over southern China in the latter part of this week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260412","week":"Sunday","forecastWind":"South force 4, force 5 on high ground at first.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with one or two isolated showers.
